projects.description:
Project Details

Classification:
- Classified by the Capital Authority as a Medium-Density Project

Location:
- Direct view of the Western Axis, directly opposite the pharmaceutical companies
- Overlooking the Central Business District (CBD) and the Iconic Tower
- Located on the main arterial road connecting the “Measure of Excellence” area in the New Administrative Capital (North Mohammed Bin Zayed Axis) with the Financial and Government District

Building Specifications:
- Ground Floor + 13 Floors
- 5 Parking Basement Levels
- Total Land Area: 2,700 sqm
- Typical Floor Area: 800 sqm

Floor Distribution:
- Ground Floor: Food & Beverage
- First Floor: Retail
- Second Floor: Food Court
- Third Floor: Medical
- Fourth to Thirteenth Floors: Administrative

Units:
- Fully finished administrative units with air conditioning
- Panorama finishing with direct views of the Western Axis

Payment Plan:
- Installment period up to 15 years
projects.location: New Capital , Down Town - Western Axis , Egypt
projects.name: Verity Business Complex

projects.description:
Project Details

Location:
- Plot MU5-3, Downtown Area
- Directly overlooking the Western Central Park
- Next to the Ministries District, Banks District, and the Green River

Project Description:
- Ground Floor + 15 Floors
- 3-Level Underground Parking Garage
- Total Land Area: 3,275 sqm

Spaces & Usage:
- Ground Floor: Restaurant & Café 🍽️
- First Floor: Kids Hub 🏎️🛫
- Second Floor: Food Court 🍟🍔🍕🍩
- Third Floor: World Gym 🚧🤼♂️🚧
- Fourth to Fifteenth Floors: Administration Offices 📔📒

Units:
- Fully finished administrative offices starting from 35 sqm

Consultants:
- Engineering Consultant: Hafez Constantly
- Management Company: Brain 2 Fact

projects.name: Valencia Valle

projects.description:
Project Details

Classification:
- Mixed-Use Commercial Strip Mall

Location:
- Prime location overlooking Rock Vera Street and the 800m Lagoon
- Strategically positioned to serve compound residents and outside visitors
- High visibility with double-view frontage

Unit Types & Starting Prices:
- Commercial Units:
  - Spaces: 29 sqm
  - Price per sqm: 162,750 EGP
  - Total Price: 4,719,750 EGP
- Administrative Units:
  - Spaces: 44 sqm
  - Price per sqm: 82,159 EGP
  - Total Price: 3,708,892 EGP

Selling Points:
- Prime Location
- All business activities in one integrated strip area:
  - Commercial
  - Administrative
  - Food Court
  - Medical
  - Serviced Apartments
- Serving both compound residents and external visitors
- Double View: Rock Vera Street & 800m Lagoon
- Efficient Construction Ratio
- Smart Architectural Design
- 3 Malls connected only at first floor level for efficient crowd management

Building Specifications:
- Ground Floor + Multiple Upper Floors
- Smart layout for maximum operational efficiency
- Integrated strip mall concept

Delivery:
- Delivery within 3 Years

Payment Plan:
- Flexible installment plans available.
projects.name: V-HUB
